title: Why Allstate Stock Sank by Almost 10% This Week
text: The market punishes the company for a fourth-quarter forecast that featured very deep net losses

title: Allstate (ALL) Unveils Preliminary Fourth-Quarter Estimates
text: Allstate (ALL) expects its premiums to register year-over-year increase in the fourth quarter of 2022 resulting from continued rate increases. However, catastrophe losses might dampen its underwriting results.

title: Allstate tells Wall Street to brace for higher catastrophe losses in Q4, thanks to December winter storm
text: Allstate Corp. late Wednesday told Wall Street to expect higher catastrophe losses on its balance sheet, thanks to the severe winter storm that blanketed two-thirds of the U.S. in frigid temperatures and snow in December.

title: Allstate Announces Estimated Fourth Quarter 2022 Results
text: NORTHBROOK, Ill.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--The Allstate Corporation (NYSE: ALL) today announced preliminary results for the fourth quarter of 2022, with an estimated net loss between $285 million and $335 million and estimated adjusted net loss* between $335 million and $385 million.

title: 7 Defensive Stocks to Buy as House Republicans Bicker
text: If there was ever a reason to consider defensive stocks to buy, House Republicans gave one of the most compelling. After 15 rounds of voting amid deep divisions in the conservative party, Representative Kevin McCarthy of California finally won the election as the new House Speaker.

title: Allstate to Discuss Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings With Investors
text: NORTHBROOK, Ill.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--The Allstate Corporation (NYSE: ALL) will conduct a conference call and webcast at 9 a.m. Eastern on Thursday, Feb. 2, 2023, to discuss fourth quarter 2022 earnings.

title: TRV or ALL: Which P&C Stock is Better-Placed at the Moment?
text: Travelers (TRV) and Allstate (ALL) are poised to grow in the promising P&C insurance space. We try to find out which stock fares better via comparative evaluation.
